name: /spec emitted tests carry a Test-Driven-By trailer naming the feature id for traceability
command: mkdir -p tests profiles repo && (cd repo && git init -q) && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "feature x" --profile profiles/p.yaml --tests-out tests --root repo --feature-id feat-x --commit 2>err.txt && (cd repo && git log -1 --format=%B 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Test-Driven-By: feat-x') && echo ok 1>&2
